channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian

Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I hadn’t realised Andy Burnham had done a Tik Tok about not building on fields. He is mayor of Makerfield and his own policy prescribes building on fields, because it isn’t possible to hit housing targets any other way
item.description: I hadn’t realised Andy Burnham had done a Tik Tok about not building on fields. He is mayor of Makerfield and his own policy prescribes building on fields, because it isn’t possible to hit housing targets any other way

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour faces union backlash after minister says living wage extension to over-18s not certain before election – as it happened
item.description: Labour faces union backlash after minister says living wage extension to over-18s not certain before election – as it happened

item.title: The Guardian: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian
item.description: Should Keir Starmer follow Mikel Arteta’s leadership method? | Letters - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The less we hear from Tony Blair, the better | Letters
item.description: The less we hear from Tony Blair, the better | Letters

item.title: i Politics: Burnham as PM would not beat Farage in a general election, poll shows
item.description: Burnham as PM would not beat Farage in a general election, poll shows

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Do not hold back any Mandelson documents, Tories tell Starmer as they issue contempt warning
item.description: Do not hold back any Mandelson documents, Tories tell Starmer as they issue contempt warning

item.title: Byline Times: 'Tony Blair Is Offering a Victorian Answer to a 21st Century Crisis'
item.description: 'Tony Blair Is Offering a Victorian Answer to a 21st Century Crisis'

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Young and unemployed? Join the military, defence minister says
item.description: Young and unemployed? Join the military, defence minister says

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Ministers unveil new crackdown on Russian saboteurs trying to damage Britain’s vital undersea cables
item.description: Ministers unveil new crackdown on Russian saboteurs trying to damage Britain’s vital undersea cables
